headline: The Cash Machine The Market Put On Sale: INTU
summary: The market is selling shares in a software giant as if its cash-generating days are numbered, yet the business is paying out more than double the average company.

headline: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: ADP (ADP) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Automatic Data Processing, Raises Price Target to $295
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Ramsey El-Assal   maintains Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $244 to $295.
